publishedAbstract: * Generating a `sosreport` on our systems takes on average between 5-8 hours. However, this should not take more than 15 minutes. When deactivating the `cgroups` plugin, it takes just 6 minutes to generate a normal `sosreport`. * When running `sosreport` with the `cgroup` plugin enabled on OpenShift Node, we can see that `cgroup` plugin takes a lot of time to complete. ~~~ [plugin: cgroups] recursively adding 'cgroup.event_control' from '/ sys / fs / cgroup / systemd' [plugin: cgroups] copying path '/sys/fs/cgroup/systemd/cgroup.event_control' to archive: '/ sys / fs / cgroup / systemd / cgroup.event_control' [plugin: cgroups] recursively adding 'notify_on_release' from '/ sys / fs / cgroup / systemd' [plugin: cgroups] copying path '/ sys / fs / cgroup / systemd / notify_on_release' to archive: '/ sys / fs / cgroup / systemd / notify_on_release' [plugin: cgroups] recursively adding 'cgroup.procs' from '/ sys / fs / cgroup / systemd' [plugin: cgroups] copying path '/sys/fs/cgroup/systemd/cgroup.procs' to archive: '/ sys / fs / cgroup / systemd / cgroup.procs' [plugin: cgroups] recursively adding 'tasks' from '/ sys / fs / cgroup / systemd' [plugin: cgroups] copying path '/ sys / fs / cgroup / systemd / tasks' to archive: '/ sys / fs / cgroup / systemd / tasks' [plugin: cgroups] unpacked command tuple: ('systemd-cgls', 'None', 'None', 300, 'True', 'True', 'None', 'None', 'False 25') [plugin: cgroups] collecting output of 'systemd-cgls' [plugin: cgroups] collected output of 'systemd-cgls' in 0.325278997421 [plugin: cgroups] collected plugin 'cgroups' in 307.146094084 ~~~ * sosreport collects so many files (300k files) and it takes so long time like 7 hours.
publishedTitle: sosreport is taking a long time on a system which has numerous namespaces or files.
